F

FabricaEstilos - Class in com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view
Utility class that centralizes every CSS style manipulation performed on the Sudoku view components.
FabricaEstilos() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
fila - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController.ManejadorTeclado
Row coordinate associated with this handler.
fila - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Row index of the cell within the board (0-based).
fila - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia
Row index of the suggested cell.
filas - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Logical grouping of cells by row.
FILAS_POR_BLOQUE - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Number of rows per block.
filtroEntrada - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Shared adapter that filters keyboard input on every cell.
